text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Tenno Sho approaching in the spring,
Rice Shower intensifies her training so she can
become a blue rose for more and more people.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, it seems she's also worried about
disappointing those who are helping her reach
that goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy argues that the blue rose in the
story was unable to bloom by itself, so Rice
Shower should also reach out for help when she
needs it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her words hit hard, and Rice Shower decides that
she does, in fact, need help.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She asks Mihono Bourbon to assist with her
training, and Bourbon agrees. Thus begins
Bourbon's rumored "demonic" training regimen.
